text:
1. Determine the time zone offsets: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, and Australia/Sydney is UTC + 10.
2. Calculate the time difference: The time difference between the two time - zones is (UTC + 10)-(UTC - 10)=20 hours.
3. Add the time difference to the given time: 21:00 + 20 hours = 17:00 on September 24, 1118.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:00
